transcript_facts:
- [Findings] so on exam you do have some tenderness over the medial portion of your knee over the medial meniscus area . um , you have normal sensation . so let's take a look at your x-rays .
- [Findings] hey dragon , show me the x-rays . so looking at the x-ray , um , of your left knee , uh , it appears to be there's no fractures there right now . i do n't see any , uh , there's a little bit of , uh , fluid , uh , but there is no , uh , there's no , um , fracture or there's no dislocation .
- [Findings] so in summary after my exam , uh , looking at your knee , uh , on the x-ray and your exam , you have some tenderness over the medial meniscus , so i think you have probably an acute medial meniscus sprain right now or strain . we'll have you come back in about a week and see how you're doing , and if it's not better , we'll get an mri at that time .
- [History of Present Illness] all right , hey , dragon , ms. thompson is a 43 year old female here for right knee pain .
- [History of Present Illness] i have been putting ice on it , uh , and i've been taking ibuprofen , but it does n't seem to help much .
- [History of Present Illness] and you've been taking a little bit of ice , uh , putting some ice on it , and has n't really helped and some ibuprofen .
- [History of Present Illness] uh , afib . okay , and are you taking any medications for that ?
- [History of Present Illness] uh , digoxin ?
- [History of Present Illness] how about any surgeries in the past ? i have had a nose job .
- [History of Present Illness] so is it tender ... where is it mostly tender right now ?
- [History of Present Illness] any other pain down here in your calves ?
- [History of Present Illness] uh , there is no , uh , there is a little bit of tenderness when i flex your , uh , when i , uh , uh , do some valgus stressing on your , on your leg .
- [History of Present Illness] uh , at this point , my recommendation would be to put you in a knee brace , uh , and we'll go ahead and have you use some crutches temporarily for the next couple days .
- [History of Present Illness] i'm going to recommend we give you some motrin , 800 milligrams .
